Package scenarios

Class WSNDataCollectionScenario

java.lang.Object
scenarios.WSNDataCollectionScenario
All Implemented Interfaces:
SimulationScenario
public final class WSNDataCollectionScenario extends Object implements SimulationScenario
The original MSc thesis scenario: a UAV collecting data tokens from a wireless sensor network deployed across a field configured via config.properties.

Runs two strategies side-by-side for comparison as specified in run.intelligences:

  1. Predefined four-corner patrol (baseline)
  2. GA→ACO→LocalSearch adaptive path planner

Environment parameters (field size, node count, drone range, …) are loaded from config.properties in the working directory. Edit that file to change settings without recompiling. Falls back to sensible defaults when the file is absent.

Adding a new strategy

  1. Implement UAVIntelligence.
  2. Register it in AppConfig REGISTRY.
  3. Add its key to run.intelligences in config.properties.

Usage

   SimulationRunner.fromScenario(new WSNDataCollectionScenario())
       .withSeed(17L)
       .run();

      public SimulationConfig getConfig()
      Description copied from interface: SimulationScenario
      Field dimensions, timing, drone range, and node parameters for this scenario. Use SimulationConfig.builder() to construct.
      Specified by:
      getConfig in interface SimulationScenario

    • getIntelligences

      public List<UAVIntelligence> getIntelligences()
      Returns the intelligence strategies listed in run.intelligences. Register new strategies in AppConfig REGISTRY and add their key to config.properties — no changes needed here.
      Specified by:
      getIntelligences in interface SimulationScenario

    • getPlannerFactory

      public Supplier<PathPlanner> getPlannerFactory()
      Uses the GA→ACO planner with research-calibrated defaults. Override GaAcoConfig.defaults() via the withXxx copy-and-override methods if you need a custom configuration.
      Specified by:
      getPlannerFactory in interface SimulationScenario
